programs.title: Motorway Patrol
programs.desc: Street racers reach 192km/h. Hot and bothered with a van full of flames. A breakdown causes chaos in the Waterview Tunnel.

programs.title: Britain's Got Talent
programs.desc: The semi-finals are here! Who will impress and progress, and who will be going home as superstar judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and KSI seek out the next big thing?

programs.title: Code Blue: One Punch Killers
programs.desc: Explores the issue of one-punch killings after there were a reported 82 deaths of this type across the UK over the past five years. With rare access to detectives, we look at three cases in detail.

programs.title: New Amsterdam
programs.desc: A patient's treatment plan takes an unexpected turn when Max (Ryan Eggold) gets overly invested. Meanwhile, Reynolds (Jocko Sims) celebrates his birthday with some help from the hospital and Kapoor (Anupam Kher) grapples with a case that hits close to home.

programs.title: Harry's Practice
programs.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.
